title: Shingeki No Craft Switch Titans
description: Easily swap between your titans in the Shingeki no Craft Mod with this powerful addon, giving you full control over your transformations!
body:
This addon allows you to freely switch between titans when using the [Shingeki No Craft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shingeki-no-craft) mod by Fanfo!

In the original mod, you can acquire multiple titans, but you are locked to your first titan shifter. Even though owning several titans grants you access to new abilities – such as the Cart Titan’s infinite stamina – you cannot switch, for example, from the Attack Titan to the Cart Titan once you’ve got your initial titan.

This addon solves that problem by adding a simple keybind (R by default) that lets you swap between all the titans you own at any time.

Once you have obtained a titan shifter in the original mod, eating another titan shifter will now allow you to choose which titan you want to play as by pressing R.

For example, if you first ate the Attack Titan and later eat the Colossal Titan, you will no longer be forced to play only as the Attack Titan. By pressing R, you will be notified that your main titan has switched to the Colossal Titan.
